summary: Iteration 60 - Data Persistence API Testing: All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Verified that companies and avatars are now stored in MongoDB via /api/data/ endpoints. Frontend successfully loads data from server on mount and saves new companies to server.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height < 0 - should set minWidth/minHeight

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ companies created by pytest and UI_TestCompany created via frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data persistence API is fully functional. Companies and avatars are stored in MongoDB collections 'companies' and 'avatars'. Frontend PipelineView loads data from /api/data/companies and /api/data/avatars on mount. localStorage is used as fallback only when API fails.

backend.GET /api/data/companies: Returns array of companies for authenticated user - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/companies (create): Creates new company with proper fields - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/companies (update): Updates existing company by id - PASSED
backend.GET /api/data/avatars: Returns array of avatars for authenticated user - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/avatars (create): Creates new avatar with proper fields - PASSED
backend.POST /api/data/avatars (update): Updates existing avatar by id - PASSED
backend.DELETE /api/data/avatars: Deletes all avatars for user - PASSED
backend.AgentZZ company: Pre-seeded company exists in database - PASSED

frontend.Load companies from API: PipelineView loads companies on mount - VERIFIED (AgentZZ and TEST_ companies shown)
frontend.Save company to server: Frontend POST to /api/data/companies works - VERIFIED (UI_TestCompany_1773722735 saved)
frontend.Company modal: New Company modal has logo upload, name, phone, website fields
frontend.Company list display: Companies show with name, phone, WA badge, website

mongodb_collections.companies: Stores company data with user_id index
mongodb_collections.avatars: Stores avatar data with user_id index
mongodb_collections.database: agentzz (as per data.py, though backend/.env shows test_database)

notes: data.py hardcodes DB_NAME default to 'agentzz' but backend/.env has DB_NAME='test_database' - data router uses its own default
Frontend has localStorage fallback when API calls fail (e.g., unauthenticated)
